comments.text: No, you cannot use another person's driving license to claim vehicle insurance. The insurance company requires the driving license of the person who was driving the vehicle at the time of the accident for claim processing
comments.author: @LearnWithSachinLWS

comments.text: No, you cannot use another person's driving license to claim vehicle insurance. The insurance company requires the driving license of the person who was driving the vehicle at the time of the accident for claim processing
